meta.title: Sage Tax Consultancy | Expert Tax Advisory in UAE
meta.description: UAE's trusted tax consultancy. Expert VAT, Corporate Tax, Accounting & Auditing services in Dubai. FTA-approved advisors helping businesses grow with confidence.

about.title: Your Strategic Tax Partner in the UAE
about.description: We turn complex regulation into strategic advantage — so UAE businesses can grow with confidence.

about.visionText: To be the most trusted name in Gulf tax advisory, recognized for clarity, client focus, and measurable impact.

features.ftaApprovedDesc: Listed with the UAE Federal Tax Authority. Our advisors hold recognized tax-agent certifications.
features.sectorSpecializedDesc: Dedicated teams for e-commerce, real estate, hospitality, energy, and professional services.
features.techDrivenDesc: Cloud bookkeeping, automated VAT workflows, and live reporting dashboards for real-time visibility.
features.transparentFeesDesc: Fixed-price engagements with upfront scopes. No hidden charges, no hourly surprises.
features.boutiqueAgilityDesc: Direct partner access and rapid response times. No layers of bureaucracy.

services.title: Comprehensive Tax & Business Solutions
services.subtitle: From VAT compliance to company formation — end-to-end advisory built for UAE businesses.

corporate.description: Company registration, PRO services, Golden Visa, and full business setup support.
